// 01 — About Me

The Person Behind The Data

I'm a results-driven Data Analyst with ~3 years of experience specializing in SQL analytics, Power BI dashboards, and end-to-end BI solutions. I turn raw, complex datasets into decision-ready insights that directly drive business impact.

My project work spans Consumer Goods Sales Analysis — where I analyzed 1L+ transactions using T-SQL to uncover revenue leakage, payment gaps, and customer churn signals — Retail Sales & Customer Analysis using Power BI and DAX to track $725K in sales, 21% growth, and customer segmentation across regions — and Bank Customer Churn Analysis combining SQL and Power BI to identify attrition drivers and support retention strategy.

Driven by ownership, continuous learning, stakeholder collaboration, and business-focused analytics, I build scalable BI solutions that deliver measurable, real-world impact.

// 03 — Projects

My Work

SQL
Retail Analytics / Business Analytics
Consumer Goods Sales Analysis
ProblemRevenue flat 4 years, 33% cancellation rate, customers churning silently — zero consolidated reporting.
Dataset1L+ transactions across 9 source tables (Sales, Shipment, Returns, Payments, Customers) · 2022–2025
Approach54 T-SQL queries across revenue trends, churn classification, payment reconciliation & customer segmentation
Insights33.5% cancellation · ₹20.96 Cr revenue at risk · 2,389 at-risk customers · Return root cause = Late Delivery
ImpactReplaced ad hoc Excel reporting with a production-ready SQL analytics layer across all 9 business domains

ECommerce / Retail Analytics
Retail Sales and Customer Analysis
ProblemNo unified KPI view — management had no visibility into sales trends, regional gaps, or customer behavior.
DatasetNovamart retail dataset · Orders, products, customers, regions · Multi-year transaction data
ApproachStar schema data model in Power BI + DAX measures for Sales, Profit, AOV, Delivery & Customer KPIs
Insights$725K sales tracked · 21% YoY growth · Customer segmentation across 4 regions · Delivery SLA gaps identified
ImpactDelivered an executive-ready dashboard enabling data-backed decisions on inventory, marketing & logistics

Power BI
Banking Analytics / Customer Analytics
Bank Customer Churn Analysis — SQL & BI Case Study
Problem20.66% churn rate — retention team had no data on who was leaving, when, or why.
Dataset10K bank customers · Demographics, tenure, credit score, balance, activity level · 2016–2019
ApproachSQL for data prep + Power BI star schema model + DAX measures for churn rate, monthly exits & segment analysis
InsightsFemale customers churn 56% more · Fair credit score = highest exits · Inactive members = primary churn driver
ImpactEnabled data-backed retention strategy targeting high-risk segments · Contributing to ~12% churn risk reduction

Consumer Goods SQL Analytics — Built a structured SQL analytics layer across 9 source systems on 1L+ transactions.
